data.title: Invalda INVL to sell 1.22% of Artea Bank shares
data.description: On 12 March, Invalda INVL, the prominent Baltic asset management group, finalized a deal with Tesonet Global to sell 7,987,158 shares of Artea Bank, equivalent to 1.22% of the bank's total shares. Following this transaction, Invalda INVL still maintains a significant ownership stake in Artea Bank, with a holding of 19.94% of the bank's shares.

data.title: Trump Says Higher Oil Means US Makes 'A Lot Of Money' – Markets Disagree
data.description: President Donald Trump expressed a positive view on rising crude prices, identifying higher oil prices as a source of revenue for the U.S. However, financial markets told a different story with the VIX surging above 26, Goldman Sachs cautioning about a potential $110 per barrel Brent crude scenario, and equities experiencing a significant downturn. West Texas Intermediate crude surpassed $94 per barrel, representing an 8% increase from the previous day, due to escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz heightening concerns of a prolonged supply disruption. Trump highlighted the U.S.'s position as the largest oil producer globally, asserting that higher oil prices result in substantial profits for the country. Nevertheless, Wall Street viewed the situation differently, considering the surge in oil prices as more of a burden than a benefit. The S&P 500, as reflected by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), declined by approximately 1.1% in the morning, while the Nasdaq-100 and the Dow Jones Industrial Average also experienced drops of 1.2% and 1.3%, respectively. For further details, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: OpenEvidence Achieves Historic Milestone: 1 Million Clinical Consultations between Verified Doctors and an Artificial Intelligence System in a Single Day
data.description: In the medical field, a groundbreaking development has emerged: the rise of Scaled Medical Intelligence. In a significant event on March 10, 2026, over one million clinical consultations took place in just 24 hours. This milestone marked the inaugural instance where NPI-verified doctors engaged with the AI system, OpenEvidence, showcasing a new era in medicine's evolution towards digitized intelligence. The event, which occurred in Miami, foretells a future where technology and medical expertise seamlessly intertwine to revolutionize patient care and diagnosis methods.

data.title: Netskope Analysts Lower Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
data.description: Netskope Inc (NASDAQ: NTSK) released its fourth-quarter results, exceeding expectations. The company reported quarterly losses of 4 cents per share, surpassing the estimated losses of 7 cents per share. Quarterly sales amounted to $196.330 million, higher than the expected $188.829 million. Netskope anticipates FY2027 adjusted EPS of $(0.19) compared to the market's $(0.20) estimate. Sales for the next period are projected to range between $870.000 million and $876.000 million, beating estimates of $865.238 million. Netskope's CEO, Sanjay Beri, commented on the positive outcome, citing record net new ARR in Q4 and achieving the first year of positive free cash flow in fiscal 2026. This reflects the company's strength and adaptation to the AI Supercycle. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Anixa Biosciences Featured on Water Tower Research Healthcare Happenings Podcast
data.description: Today, in San Jose, California, Anixa Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIX), a prominent biotechnology firm specializing in cancer treatment and prevention, revealed that its Chairman and CEO, Dr. Amit Kumar, is highlighted in the latest episode of Water Tower.

data.title: Dreame Debuts AURORA Smartphones at AWE 2026 With Modular Camera System and Luxury Lineup
data.description: At the AWE 2026 event, Dreame introduced its new line of smartphones called AURORA, featuring 29 models in the AURORA LUX Series that combine technology and luxury, as well as the innovative NEX LS1, the world's first modular imaging flagship. These new phones are aimed at the premium market worldwide. Emphasizing a "Technology First" approach, Dreame plans to invest more than RMB 10 million in the development and promotion of these devices.

data.title: Tesonet Global Targets to Increase its Interest in Artea Bankas
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Artea Bankas, AB received notice from Tesonet Global, UAB regarding the intention to raise its ownership share in the Bank to a maximum of 31.68%, which includes the current stake held by Tesonet Global. Tesonet Global has initiated transactions to achieve this target.

data.title: Barte Selects Oscilar’s AI-Native Risk Decisioning Platform to Transform Fraud and Compliance Operations
data.description: A collaboration between Brazilian financial platform Barte and technology companies Oscilar and Mastercard risk intelligence is set to drive the next phase of growth for Barte. This partnership aims to leverage advanced AI technology to enhance the platform's capabilities. With this move, Barte seeks to expand its reach and improve its services using cutting-edge risk intelligence solutions. This strategic alliance is geared towards propelling Barte's expansion efforts, indicating a significant development in the financial technology sector.

data.title: Endometriosis Market Expected to Achieve Significant CAGR During the Forecast Period (2026-2036) Driven by Innovative Treatment Options | DelveInsight
data.description: Over the period from 2026 to 2036, the endometriosis market is projected to experience continuous growth. This growth is anticipated to be fueled by increasing awareness of the disease, improving rates of diagnosis, and advancements in noninvasive diagnostic methods. Additionally, the market is expected to benefit from the introduction of new therapeutic options like HMI-115.

data.title: Colorado State University Global and Denver Public Schools Partner to Provide Guaranteed Admission for High School Students
data.description: In a recent announcement made on March 12, 2026, Colorado State University Global (CSU Global) and Denver Public Schools (DPS) have joined forces to offer guaranteed admission to CSU Global undergraduate programs and discounted tuition rates for DPS students. This collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of students in the DPS district, providing them with greater access to higher education opportunities. The partnership aims to facilitate easier pathways for DPS students to pursue further education and enhance their academic and professional prospects.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops Protective Accessory for Ratchet Straps (SBT-2225)
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Phelan, California, shared their inspiration behind creating the Ratchet Strap Bag. The inventor aimed to offer truckers a straightforward way to secure and stabilize the loose tail ends of tightened ratchet straps. The innovative product addresses this issue effectively, providing a practical solution for ensuring the safe transportation of goods.

data.title: Delta Faucet Named to USA TODAY's Most Trusted Brands 2026
data.description: Delta Faucet, a prominent player in the kitchen and bath industry, was recently acknowledged for its brand trustworthiness and strong consumer confidence. The company has been named as one of the most trusted brands in America. This recognition came from USA TODAY and highlights the high level of trust that consumers have in Delta Faucet. The news was announced on March 12, 2026, and underlines the company's reputation and standing in the industry. This recognition is a testament to the trust and confidence that consumers have in Delta Faucet.

data.title: New Survey Finds 53% of Americans Would Give Up Everyday Expenses to Pay for Cosmetic Treatments
data.description: In celebration of LaserAway's 20th anniversary, a study was conducted to explore changing attitudes among Americans towards beauty spending, trust, and normalization. The survey, commissioned by LaserAway, a top player in aesthetic dermatology nationwide, revealed significant insights. Key highlights include the shifts in beauty expenditure patterns and the evolving perceptions of trust and normalization among consumers. This survey, undertaken during LaserAway's milestone 20th year, provides valuable findings regarding the changing dynamics in the beauty industry.

data.title: Ambarella is recognized as an 'Emerging Leaders Company' in MarketsandMarkets' latest 360Quadrant for the System-on-Chip Market
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Ambarella, Inc., headquartered in California, is a leading edge AI semiconductor company. The company specializes in developing energy-efficient, advanced AI system-on-chip (SoC) solutions for various intelligent edge applications like video security, robotics, drones, and industrial uses.
